description_long: This object is a vintage corded telephone with a classic rotary dial and a robust, rectangular base. The base is predominantly black with metallic gold accents, including a dome-shaped central feature and rotary dial surround. The handset, also black with gold ends, rests on a cradle supported by two posts, and is connected to the base by a coiled black cord. The rotary dial features white number markers and a central label, adding to its antique aesthetic. The overall design is angular and solid, with a visible cord extending from the left side of the base. The materials and finish evoke a sense of durability and historical charm, typical of early 20th-century telephones.
description: A vintage black and gold rotary dial corded telephone with a coiled cord and sturdy rectangular base. The handset rests on a cradle, and the rotary dial features white number markers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, central gold dome, and the handset resting on the cradle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold end of the handset, the coiled cord, and the rectangular profile of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handset, the gold dome, and the coiled cord extending from the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the gold end of the handset and the solid side of the base.
